titles.ar: باب شَهَادَةِ الْمَرْأَةِ لِزَوْجِهَا وَ الزَّوْجِ لِلْمَرْأَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 14 – Testimony of the wife for her husband, and of the husband for the wife

titles.ar: باب شَهَادَةِ الْمَرْأَةِ لِزَوْجِهَا وَ الزَّوْجِ لِلْمَرْأَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 14 – Testimony of the wife for her husband, and of the husband for the wife

segments: قَالَ تَجُوزُ شَهَادَةُ الرَّجُلِ لِامْرَأَتِهِ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ لِزَوْجِهَا إِذَا كَانَ مَعَهَا غَيْرُهَا .
arabic.text: قَالَ تَجُوزُ شَهَادَةُ الرَّجُلِ لِامْرَأَتِهِ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ لِزَوْجِهَا إِذَا كَانَ مَعَهَا غَيْرُهَا .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Abu Al Magra, from Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The testimony of the man is allowed for his wife, and of the woman for her husband, when there was someone else with her’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Abu Al Magra, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The testimony of the man is allowed for his wife, and of the woman for her husband, when there was someone else with her’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from abu al-Mighra’ from al-Halabiy who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the testimony of a man is acceptable for his wife and testimony of a wife is acceptable for her husband if there are others with her.”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from abu al-Mighra’ from al-Halabiy who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the testimony of a man is acceptable for his wife and testimony of a wife is acceptable for her husband if there are others with her.”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/243)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/243)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ أَبِي الْمَغْرَاءِ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب شَهَادَةِ الْمَرْأَةِ لِزَوْجِهَا وَ الزَّوْجِ لِلْمَرْأَةِ
titles.en: Chapter 14 – Testimony of the wife for her husband, and of the husband for the wife

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَوْ قَالَ سَأَلَهُ بَعْضُ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَشْهَدُ لِامْرَأَتِهِ قَالَ إِذَا كَانَ خَيِّراً جَازَتْ شَهَادَتُهُ لِامْرَأَتِهِ.
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَوْ قَالَ سَأَلَهُ بَعْضُ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَشْهَدُ لِامْرَأَتِهِ قَالَ إِذَا كَانَ خَيِّراً جَازَتْ شَهَادَتُهُ لِامْرَأَتِهِ.

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Mahboub, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Ammar Bin Marwan who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>’, or said, ‘One of our companions asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the man who testified for his wife’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If it was good, his testimony for his wife is allowed’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Mahboub, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Ammar Bin Marwan who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>’, or said, ‘One of our companions asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the man who testified for his wife’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If it was good, his testimony for his wife is allowed’.

segments: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn Mahbub from Hisham ibn Salim from ‘Ammar ibn Marwan who has narrated the following: “I or a certain persons of our people asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who presents testimony for his wife. He (the Imam) said, ‘If it is for a good cause it is permissible to testify for one’s wife.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn Mahbub from Hisham ibn Salim from ‘Ammar ibn Marwan who has narrated the following: “I or a certain persons of our people asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who presents testimony for his wife. He (the Imam) said, ‘If it is for a good cause it is permissible to testify for one’s wife.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/243)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/243)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ سَالِمٍ عَنْ عَمَّارِ بْنِ مَرْوَانَ قَالَ
